expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the benchmark focus and required scenario areas: "Benchmark focus: **blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes**" and later: "Must reflect scenario drafting for the case focus: - prompt handling - template save - report builder loading - visible report title outcomes".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
